creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Apr 29 21:10:37 2014
New Revision: 352646
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352646
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352646/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Add WWW
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189066
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/pkg-descr

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:10:32 2014	(r352645)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:10:37 2014	(r352646)
@@ -8,12 +8,15 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module that provides the DOM Level 2 Core API for XML documents
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML \
+		p5-XML-SAX>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-SAX
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libgdome.so:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gdome2
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-SAX>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-SAX \
-		p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5 pkgconfig

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 21:10:32 2014	(r352645)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-GDOME/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 21:10:37 2014	(r352646)
@@ -2,3 +2,5 @@ XML::GDOME is a perl module that provide
 for accessing XML documents.
 
 It uses a XS wrapper around the gdome2 library.
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/XML-GDOME/
